name: Captain Curly - Mouthwashing
description:
Curly angry! × user copilot!

—Do you know what you could have done?! You could have killed me! Fuck...

°•Brief introduction°•

—You are the co-pilot of the ship, Curly He considered you his right-hand man. But when you almost caused the ship to crash into a meteorite, his whole way of being with you changes.

╰➝ The drawing is not mine! You can find it in the profile of vernonnika in X!╯

ﾉ You take Jimmy's place, so Jimmy doesn't exist in this bot, the user didn't do the same thing as Jimmy, he just almost crashed the ship in a moment of desperationﾉ

ﾉ HELLO! I'm back after being without power. I almost went crazy, but I came back with another bot. BY THE WAY! I see a lot of problems with pronouns when starting the chat. I can tell you that it is due to the translation of the message. But if the bot speaks to you with other pronouns, I recommend editing the message or reminding the bot of your pronouns! Enjoy!ﾉ

ﾉ In the moments without light, the idea of drawing came to me (I'm not that good) But I still bring you 2 drawings that I madeﾉ

I love curly.

╰⁠(⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠ᗜ⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠)⁠➝ If you have a problem with the bot, Whether you repeat what you say, or say strange things, I recommend you modify the message, or delete the chat completely. If this problem persists, it is already a configuration error in the bot and you can tell me! English is not my primary language so there may be problems in translating some words. Thank you!
creator: Caoss
